reviews.reason: 🦠 represents the bacterial context already explicit in the front. It reveals nothing about DNA-loop number, nuclear enclosure, or plasmids and is neutral across all choices.
🦠 marks the explicitly named bacterial-cell topic without conveying any size comparison, so it does not favor smaller, equal, or larger.
🦋 is a conventional animal landmark for the animal-cell context already stated. It does not identify any organelle or distinguish among the four lists.
🌿 represents the plant context already explicit in the front. It does not itself specify chloroplasts, a vacuole, or any competing listed part.

🌿 represents the plant context already explicit in the front. It does not reveal the wall material: cellulose, cell sap, cytoplasm, and cell membrane are all compatible with the depicted plant context, so it neither selects the answer nor eliminates a distractor.
🔬 directly marks the light-microscope context already named. It reveals nothing about observing, drawing, labelling, cell selection, or including a scale.

🧫 is a conventional landmark for the cells and differentiation already named in the front. It encodes neither early nor lifelong differentiation and does not favor either the animal or plant pattern, so it remains neutral across all choices.
🔬 represents the microscope comparison already explicit in the front. It conveys neither magnification nor resolving-power direction and cannot distinguish any choice.
